briefingSummary.primaryRead: 3 standouts (1 FRESH · 1 STILL ACTIVE · 1 FADING). Lead: EURUSD FRESH.
briefingSummary.operationalMeaning: Standouts are listed in priority order; each carries a confirmed-close trigger and an explicit invalidation level. Position size per the lifecycle tag (FRESH half-size, FADING quarter-size).
briefingSummary.currentRisk: 🟠🟠🟠🟠⚫ 4/5 — Elevated — elevated reactivity, size down per standout lifecycle

reversal.behaviour: Re-entry watch — if a standout invalidates intraday, wait for the structural re-test on next scan before re-engaging.

traderAction.priceLevel: Below 1.0890 (re-entry only on a fresh structural test)
traderAction.behavioralExplanation: When a standout closes through its invalidation level, the original read is OFF. Re-entry is only valid AFTER price returns to and respects the level on a FRESH 15-min close — not on a wick, not on the same scan.
confirmsContinuation: 15-min candle closes back through the invalidation level in the original direction
next 15-min candle holds the level as new support/resistance
cross-asset (DXY / VIX) re-aligns with the original direction
invalidatesContinuation: price stays on the wrong side of the invalidation level for two consecutive 15-min closes
standout drops off the next ATLAS scan
opposite-direction standout appears on the next scan
probableNextPath: re-entry sizing always starts at HALF the original planned risk
standout re-rates back into FRESH on the next clean structural test
probableFailurePath: averaging into the invalidated zone before the structural re-test
doubling planned risk to "win back" the original loss
taking the same trade three times in one session before ATLAS publishes a fresh read

reversal.dollarImpact: Re-entry sizing always starts at half of the original planned risk.

marketImpact.mechanism: Standout setups derive from structural Bullish alignment + Corey live macro confirmation + Dark Horse rank score ≥ 7/10.
marketImpact.priceReactionPath: Trigger close → entry zone → watch level → caution zone → invalidation; each level annotated with dollar consequence on the rendered card.
marketImpact.liquidityEffect: Standouts are filtered against current spreads; FRESH cards require live confirmation that the trigger zone has held under the current quote depth.
marketImpact.volatilityEffect: Elevated regime: standout sizing already adjusted via lifecycle tag
marketImpact.traderConsequence: Hitting the planned-risk line is the cost of the read being wrong; chasing past invalidation turns a $150 loss into a $400+ loss with no upside symmetry.

riskEscalation.healthy: PRE-TRIGGER: scan is fresh; structural read in place; sizing per the FRESH / STILL ACTIVE / FADING pill.
riskEscalation.caution: AT TRIGGER: confirmed close required — do NOT pre-position above the trigger.
riskEscalation.danger: POST-TRIGGER WICK: if price returns inside the entry band within 5 min on a wick, the trigger close is not yet confirmed; wait the next 5-min close.
riskEscalation.invalidation: STAND-ASIDE: invalidation level is the cost of the read being wrong. No averaging, no re-entry without a fresh structural re-test on the next scan.

confirmationCancellation.confirmsWhen: Confirmed close above Above 1.0915 confirms; entry 1.0925–1.0935 on the trigger timeframe.
confirmationCancellation.cancelsWhen: Close below Below 1.0890 on the trigger timeframe.
confirmationCancellation.dangerIf: A standout invalidates while you are positioned: exit at the next 1-min close. Do not average. Do not re-enter without a fresh structural test on a later scan.
